revision.comment: 「[[Template:Checkdate]]」の保護レベルを変更しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]] ([編集=管理者のみ許可] (無期限) [移動=管理者のみ許可] (無期限))
1 revision imported: importing the category templates
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
「[[Template:Checkdate]]」の保護レベルを変更しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]] ([編集=管理者のみ許可] (無期限) [移動=管理者のみ許可] (無期限))

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Checkdate here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Checkdate for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#ifeq:{{padleft:|7|{{{1}}}*}}|{{padleft:月|7|{{{1}}} }}
 |{{padleft:|7|{{{1}}} }}<!-- yyyy*m月~（月1桁） -->
 |{{#ifeq:{{padleft:|8|{{{1}}}*}}{{padleft:|6|{{{1}}} }}|{{padleft:月|8|{{{1}}} }}{{padleft:1|6|{{{1}}} }}
   |{{padleft:|8|{{{1}}} }}<!-- yyyy*1*月~ -->
   |{{#ifeq:{{padleft:|6|{{{1}}}*}}<!-- yyyy-m~ , yyyy-mm~ -->
           |{{#expr:trunc{{padleft:|4|{{{1|}}} }} }}-{{#expr:trunc-(-0.{{padleft:|6|{{{1|}}} }}) }}
     |{{padleft:|4|{{{1}}} }}年<!--
      -->{{#expr:-(trunc 0.{{padleft:|{{#if:{{#ifexpr:{{padleft:|7|{{{1}}}*}} }}|6|7}}|{{{1}}} }}) }}月
     |{{#if:{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#time:|{{{1}}} 2100 +7940 year}}|error}}<!-- Month yyyy , yyyy d Month など -->
       |{{#ifeq:{{padleft:|3|{{{defaultdate|}}}X}}|エラー
         |{{ErrorJA|alias={{{1|}}}|{{{defaultdate}}} }}
         |{{{defaultdate|}}}<!-- エラー出力 -->
         }}
       |{{#time:Y年F|{{{1}}} }}
       }}
     }}
   }}
 }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}</noinclude>
